title: Der Tod ist ein Arschloch
overview: An unconventional undertaker and his team want to change radically how death and grief are tabooed in our society. Less reticence, more honesty, more empathy. But how do professional undertakers act when they have to handle cases that affect them personally and emotionally? A subtle, a concise documentary about Eric Wrede and his team in action.

trailers.title: DER TOD IST EIN ARSCHLOCH // Trailer // Kinostart 27. November
